perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a vertical format mimicking a social media live stream. A young woman with her hair in a bun and a white sheer top is waving at the camera and talking excitedly. (2) She interacts with the simulated live chat, touches her face, and laughs. (3) A sudden transition occurs, showing her sitting at a dining table filled with various dishes in a restaurant. She looks at the camera with wide-eyed surprise. (4) The camera focuses on her taking a large bite of a steak, closing her eyes in exaggerated enjoyment. (5) The video ends with a full-screen promotional graphic with text and images of food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals begin immediately with greetings, accompanied by an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop BGM. (2) The female voice continues talking in a friendly, conversational tone, responding to simulated prompts. (3) A 'whoosh' sound effect marks the transition to the restaurant scene. (4) A male narrator with a professional and enthusiastic tone takes over, describing a promotion. (5) The upbeat music continues to play until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Simulated live stream UI elements including 'LIVE', viewer counts, and user comments like '千千好久不見' (Chien Chien, long time no see). (2) Decorative Text: Brand logo 'TASTY 西堤牛排' in the top right corner. (3) Functional Text in promo: '美味 MOMENT', '2025.3.1 - 4.30', '美式手抓海鮮拼盤一份' (One serving of American hand-caught seafood platter).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Live-stream style intro -> Food reaction/Eating -> Promotional offer details

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; no other distinct people are visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a white layered sheer/mesh long-sleeve top over a white camisole.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern restaurant with warm lighting, wood-paneled walls, 'TASTY' branding on the walls, and a table set with multiple plates of steak, appetizers, and drinks.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is an advertisement for TASTY (西堤牛排) steakhouse. It uses an influencer-style hook (the fake live stream) to capture attention and build rapport, then showcases the food and dining experience to create desire, concluding with a specific promotional offer to drive conversion.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is clearly promoting the restaurant brand, and the video concludes with a direct call to action regarding a specific brand promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Simulated live-stream interface; Influencer vlog aesthetic.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of a fake social media UI is a common tactic to bypass 'ad blindness' by making the content look like a personal vlog post initially.
